creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193603
py-drf-yasg-1.7.4.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-drf-yasg to 1.7.4 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/axnsan12/drf-yasg/compare/1.6.1...1.7.4

Changes to the port:
- made BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPEND more precise

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
